certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys). When operated in approved mode.
certificate.description: The Spectro Cloud Cryptographic Library v2 is a general-purpose cryptographic module incorporated into the applications to provide FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for the protection of sensitive information. The module is pre-installed and configured in supported Spectro Cloud solutions, such as Palette VerteX.
